steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table and scan for the row with the output named in the question. The input that works gives $5$. This is just a table lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the same value.

steps.title: Set the function equal to 200
steps.content: The question asks when $f(x)=200$. Since $f(x)=40x$, solve $$40x=200.$$
